summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed candidates. No shared canonical was inferred. Security-sensitive open candidates are routed to central security handling; closed candidate #68443 is recorded as already closed and out of mutation scope. Non-security PRs with failed proof/checks remain open as independent backlog items. #65359 and #70944 need maintainer judgment because the artifact marks them proof-supplied/ready for maintainer review and this job cannot merge or repair.
